task_objective: Fix the syncthing_pending_upload status icon rendering visually smaller than sibling icons in the auto-sync status bar.
tests_added: autoSyncStatusSurface.test.ts: 'tightens the pending icon viewBox so the ring fills the box like sibling icons'
design_decisions: Root cause: the pending icon's Ionicons-derived paths bake in 64 units of padding per side of a 512-unit viewBox, so the ring filled only ~81% of its 18px box versus 90-95% for sibling icons.

Chose viewBox cropping ('48 48 416 416', the ring's outer extent including stroke, centered on 256,256) over a scale transform so path coordinates stay unchanged and the spin animation's transform-origin (256px 256px) keeps working without re-derivation.
results: All 162 frontend tests pass plus tsc typecheck. Committed on fix/pending-icon-size, merged to dev, pushed, and dev release requested via workflow dispatch.
